last_agent_result.summary: Scrambled responses caused by Message.toString() returning thinking channel content mixed with response text. In LlmChatModelHelper.kt:331 and :402, message.toString() may include <|channel>thought markers, causing delta calculation at lines 343-349 and 418-422 to append thinking artifacts into the response text stream. Fix: extract text from explicit Message.channels["text"] field instead of toString(), and filter thinking markers before passing to onToken.
risks: Message.channels["text"] may not exist on all LiteRT-LM versions — fallback to toString() needed
Thinking markers may appear mid-token in the message text, requiring regex filtering before delta calculation
Changing text extraction could affect token timing/throughput metrics displayed to user
test_plan: 1. Enable logcat: adb shell setprop persist.log.tag *
2. Send a simple message like 'Hello' and observe tokens via: adb logcat -d | grep -E '(Token:|THINKING-UI)'
3. Check for <|channel>thought or <channel|> appearing in response text
4. Verify response is coherent without scrambled markers
